title: Approve ADR 0001 + amount-validation implementation
description: ADR 0001 decides to validate monetary amounts at a pure-function boundary while keeping the signed-number representation, explicitly deferring the integer-cents migration to a future persistence ADR. Tasks 1-3 (validation lib, ingest boundary, barrel/ADR) are implemented and verified (12/12 cases, tsc clean); tasks 4-6 attach to not-yet-built adapters and test infra. Please confirm the architectural call before the delivery agent picks up tasks 4-6.

title: Code Review verdict: APPROVE with notes — ledger amount validation
description: ADR 0001 amount-validation boundary reviewed: no security/critical issues, verdict APPROVE. One medium input-hardening finding (Number() accepts scientific/hex literals like '1e5'->100000) recommended before the live SMS/OCR adapter ships. Decide whether to fix now or track as task 5's first commit.
